message.content: the github action that builds the project in this repo takes like 45 minutes to run. i believe leveraging a cache of some sort would help speed it up but don't know precisely how to implement. what's the fix?

file.content:
# Copyright 2025 The Formal Conjectures Authors.

# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at

#     https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

name: Build Lean project and deploy docs

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:

# Sets permissions of the GITHUB_TOKEN to allow deployment to GitHub Pages
permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    name: Build project
    steps:

      - name: Checkout project
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install elan
        run: |
          set -o pipefail
          curl -sSfL https://github.com/leanprover/elan/releases/download/v1.4.2/elan-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz | tar xz
          ./elan-init -y --default-toolchain none
          echo "$HOME/.elan/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH

      - name: Generate All.lean
        run: |
          lake exe mk_all --lib FormalConjectures || true
          # Avoid including Test files from `Util/` to avoid inflating the
          # stats. This stop-gap should be removed after doing the TODO at
          # `fetchStatsMarkdown` in `docbuild/overwrite-index.lean`.
          grep -v "FormalConjectures\.Util\." FormalConjectures.lean > FormalConjectures/All.lean

      - name: Restore ~/.cache/mathlib
        uses: actions/cache/restore@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/mathlib
          key: oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.lean') }}
          restore-keys: |
            oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-
            oleans-

      - name: Get olean cache
        run: |
          lake exe cache unpack
          lake exe cache get

      - name: Build project
        run: |
          lake build

      - name: Pack olean cache
        run: |
          lake exe cache pack
          ls ~/.cache/mathlib

      - name: Save ~/.cache/mathlib
        uses: actions/cache/save@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.cache
          key: oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.lean') }}

      - name: Prepare documentation
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          export MATHLIB_NO_CACHE_ON_UPDATE=1  # avoids "Failed to prune ProofWidgets cloud release: no such file or directory"
          lake update formal_conjectures

      - name: Cache documentation
        uses: actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: docbuild/.lake/build/doc
          key: MathlibDoc-${{ hashFiles('docbuild/lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.lean') }}
          restore-keys: |
            MathlibDoc-${{ hashFiles('docbuild/lake-manifest.json') }}-
            MathlibDoc-

      - name: Build documentation
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          lake build FormalConjectures:docs

      - name: Extract documentation
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          mkdir out
          lake query FormalConjectures:docs > out-files.txt
          sed -i 's|^.*\.lake/build/doc/||' out-files.txt
          echo "::group::Generated files"
          cat out-files.txt
          echo "::endgroup::"
          rsync -a --files-from=out-files.txt --relative .lake/build/doc ./out

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v6
        with:
          python-version: '3.12.9'

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install pandas==2.2.3 numpy==2.2.3 plotly==5.20.0

      - name: Run plotting script
        run: |
          python docbuild/scripts/plot_growth.py

      - name: Inject stats into index.html
        shell: bash
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          lake exe overwrite_index ./out/index.html ./out/file_counts_dark.html ./out/file_counts_white.html | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

      - name: Upload docs
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: docbuild/out

  # Deployment job
  deploy:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

content.text: Let me also check the lakefile for context.

    11→
    12→name = "formal_conjectures"
    13→keywords = ["math"]
    14→defaultTargets = ["FormalConjectures"]
    15→testDriver = "FormalConjecturesTest"
    16→
    17→[leanOptions]
    18→# Pretty-prints `fun a ↦ b`

    37→

    41→# Switch off warnings generated by `sorry`
    42→leanOptions = { warn.sorry = false }

file.content:
# Copyright 2025 The Formal Conjectures Authors.
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#     https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

name = "formal_conjectures"
keywords = ["math"]
defaultTargets = ["FormalConjectures"]
testDriver = "FormalConjecturesTest"

[leanOptions]
# Pretty-prints `fun a ↦ b`
pp.unicode.fun = true
# Don't assume a typo is a new variable
autoImplicit = false
relaxedAutoImplicit = false

[[require]]
name = "mathlib"
scope = "leanprover-community"
rev = "v4.27.0"

# We make this a separate library so that we can apply different lean options.
[[lean_lib]]
name = "FormalConjecturesForMathlib"

[[lean_lib]]
name = "FormalConjecturesTest"
# Switch off warnings generated by `sorry`
leanOptions = { warn.sorry = false }

[[lean_lib]]
name = "FormalConjectures"
globs = ["FormalConjectures.+"]
# Switch off warnings generated by `sorry`
leanOptions = { warn.sorry = false }

content.text:
Here's what I found. There are two issues in the workflow:

### 1. Cache path mismatch (bug)
- **Line 58** restores `~/.cache/mathlib`
- **Line 80** saves `~/.cache` (missing `/mathlib`)

This means the saved cache includes more than intended, and the restore key may not match properly.

### 2. The project's own build artifacts aren't cached (the real bottleneck)
The current cache only covers `~/.cache/mathlib` — Mathlib's prebuilt oleans that `lake exe cache get` already downloads from Mathlib's cloud servers. That download is fast.

The 45-minute bottleneck is **building your project's own `.lean` files**. Those compiled artifacts live in `.lake/build/` and are never cached between runs. Every CI run rebuilds everything from scratch.

Here's the fix:

input.old_string:
- name: Restore ~/.cache/mathlib
        uses: actions/cache/restore@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/mathlib
          key: oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.lean') }}
          restore-keys: |
            oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-
            oleans-

      - name: Get olean cache
        run: |
          lake exe cache unpack
          lake exe cache get

      - name: Build project
        run: |
          lake build

      - name: Pack olean cache
        run: |
          lake exe cache pack
          ls ~/.cache/mathlib

      - name: Save ~/.cache/mathlib
        uses: actions/cache/save@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.cache
          key: oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.lean') }}
input.new_string:
- name: Restore Mathlib olean cache
        uses: actions/cache/restore@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/mathlib
          key: mathlib-oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}

      - name: Get Mathlib olean cache
        run: |
          lake exe cache unpack || true
          lake exe cache get

      - name: Restore project build cache
        uses: actions/cache/restore@v3
        with:
          path: .lake/build
          key: project-build-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('FormalConjectures/**/*.lean') }}
          restore-keys: |
            project-build-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-
            project-build-

      - name: Build project
        run: |
          lake build

      - name: Save project build cache
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        uses: actions/cache/save@v3
        with:
          path: .lake/build
          key: project-build-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('FormalConjectures/**/*.lean') }}

      - name: Pack Mathlib olean cache
        run: |
          lake exe cache pack

      - name: Save Mathlib olean cache
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        uses: actions/cache/save@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/mathlib
          key: mathlib-oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}

name: Build Lean project and deploy docs

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:

# Sets permissions of the GITHUB_TOKEN to allow deployment to GitHub Pages
permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    name: Build project
    steps:

      - name: Checkout project
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install elan
        run: |
          set -o pipefail
          curl -sSfL https://github.com/leanprover/elan/releases/download/v1.4.2/elan-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz | tar xz
          ./elan-init -y --default-toolchain none
          echo "$HOME/.elan/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH

      - name: Generate All.lean
        run: |
          lake exe mk_all --lib FormalConjectures || true
          # Avoid including Test files from `Util/` to avoid inflating the
          # stats. This stop-gap should be removed after doing the TODO at
          # `fetchStatsMarkdown` in `docbuild/overwrite-index.lean`.
          grep -v "FormalConjectures\.Util\." FormalConjectures.lean > FormalConjectures/All.lean

      - name: Restore ~/.cache/mathlib
        uses: actions/cache/restore@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/mathlib
          key: oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.lean') }}
          restore-keys: |
            oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-
            oleans-

      - name: Get olean cache
        run: |
          lake exe cache unpack
          lake exe cache get

      - name: Build project
        run: |
          lake build

      - name: Pack olean cache
        run: |
          lake exe cache pack
          ls ~/.cache/mathlib

      - name: Save ~/.cache/mathlib
        uses: actions/cache/save@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.cache
          key: oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.lean') }}

      - name: Prepare documentation
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          export MATHLIB_NO_CACHE_ON_UPDATE=1  # avoids "Failed to prune ProofWidgets cloud release: no such file or directory"
          lake update formal_conjectures

      - name: Cache documentation
        uses: actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: docbuild/.lake/build/doc
          key: MathlibDoc-${{ hashFiles('docbuild/lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.lean') }}
          restore-keys: |
            MathlibDoc-${{ hashFiles('docbuild/lake-manifest.json') }}-
            MathlibDoc-

      - name: Build documentation
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          lake build FormalConjectures:docs

      - name: Extract documentation
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          mkdir out
          lake query FormalConjectures:docs > out-files.txt
          sed -i 's|^.*\.lake/build/doc/||' out-files.txt
          echo "::group::Generated files"
          cat out-files.txt
          echo "::endgroup::"
          rsync -a --files-from=out-files.txt --relative .lake/build/doc ./out

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v6
        with:
          python-version: '3.12.9'

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install pandas==2.2.3 numpy==2.2.3 plotly==5.20.0

      - name: Run plotting script
        run: |
          python docbuild/scripts/plot_growth.py

      - name: Inject stats into index.html
        shell: bash
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          lake exe overwrite_index ./out/index.html ./out/file_counts_dark.html ./out/file_counts_white.html | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

      - name: Upload docs
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: docbuild/out

  # Deployment job
  deploy:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

    13→# limitations under the License.
    14→

    16→
    17→on:
    18→  push:
    19→    branches:
    20→      - main
    21→  pull_request:
    22→
    23→# Sets permissions of the GITHUB_TOKEN to allow deployment to GitHub Pages
    24→permissions:
    25→  contents: read
    26→  pages: write
    27→  id-token: write
    28→
    29→jobs:
    30→  build:
    31→    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    32→    name: Build project
    33→    steps:
    34→

    36→        uses: actions/checkout@v6

file.content:
# Copyright 2025 The Formal Conjectures Authors.

# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at

#     https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.

name: Build Lean project and deploy docs

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:

# Sets permissions of the GITHUB_TOKEN to allow deployment to GitHub Pages
permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    name: Build project
    steps:

      - name: Checkout project
        uses: actions/checkout@v6
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install elan
        run: |
          set -o pipefail
          curl -sSfL https://github.com/leanprover/elan/releases/download/v1.4.2/elan-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz | tar xz
          ./elan-init -y --default-toolchain none
          echo "$HOME/.elan/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH

      - name: Generate All.lean
        run: |
          lake exe mk_all --lib FormalConjectures || true
          # Avoid including Test files from `Util/` to avoid inflating the
          # stats. This stop-gap should be removed after doing the TODO at
          # `fetchStatsMarkdown` in `docbuild/overwrite-index.lean`.
          grep -v "FormalConjectures\.Util\." FormalConjectures.lean > FormalConjectures/All.lean

      - name: Restore Mathlib olean cache
        uses: actions/cache/restore@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/mathlib
          key: mathlib-oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}

      - name: Get Mathlib olean cache
        run: |
          lake exe cache unpack || true
          lake exe cache get

      - name: Restore project build cache
        uses: actions/cache/restore@v3
        with:
          path: .lake/build
          key: project-build-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('FormalConjectures/**/*.lean') }}
          restore-keys: |
            project-build-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-
            project-build-

      - name: Build project
        run: |
          lake build

      - name: Save project build cache
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        uses: actions/cache/save@v3
        with:
          path: .lake/build
          key: project-build-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('FormalConjectures/**/*.lean') }}

      - name: Pack Mathlib olean cache
        run: |
          lake exe cache pack

      - name: Save Mathlib olean cache
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
        uses: actions/cache/save@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/mathlib
          key: mathlib-oleans-${{ hashFiles('lake-manifest.json') }}

      - name: Prepare documentation
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          export MATHLIB_NO_CACHE_ON_UPDATE=1  # avoids "Failed to prune ProofWidgets cloud release: no such file or directory"
          lake update formal_conjectures

      - name: Cache documentation
        uses: actions/cache@v5
        with:
          path: docbuild/.lake/build/doc
          key: MathlibDoc-${{ hashFiles('docbuild/lake-manifest.json') }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.lean') }}
          restore-keys: |
            MathlibDoc-${{ hashFiles('docbuild/lake-manifest.json') }}-
            MathlibDoc-

      - name: Build documentation
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          lake build FormalConjectures:docs

      - name: Extract documentation
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          mkdir out
          lake query FormalConjectures:docs > out-files.txt
          sed -i 's|^.*\.lake/build/doc/||' out-files.txt
          echo "::group::Generated files"
          cat out-files.txt
          echo "::endgroup::"
          rsync -a --files-from=out-files.txt --relative .lake/build/doc ./out

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v6
        with:
          python-version: '3.12.9'

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install pandas==2.2.3 numpy==2.2.3 plotly==5.20.0

      - name: Run plotting script
        run: |
          python docbuild/scripts/plot_growth.py

      - name: Inject stats into index.html
        shell: bash
        run: |
          cd docbuild
          lake exe overwrite_index ./out/index.html ./out/file_counts_dark.html ./out/file_counts_white.html | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

      - name: Upload docs
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: docbuild/out

  # Deployment job
  deploy:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

content.text:
Here's a summary of what changed and why:

### Problems fixed

1. **Cache path mismatch (bug)**: The old workflow restored `~/.cache/mathlib` but saved `~/.cache`. Fixed to be consistent.

2. **Project build artifacts not cached (the big one)**: The old workflow only cached Mathlib oleans (which `lake exe cache get` already fetches from Mathlib's cloud — fast). The actual 45-minute cost is compiling your project's own `.lean` files. Those `.lake/build` artifacts were rebuilt from scratch every run.

3. **Unnecessary cache churn**: The old Mathlib cache key included `hashFiles('**/*.lean')`, causing a new cache entry for every source change. Mathlib oleans only change when `lake-manifest.json` changes (i.e., when you bump the Mathlib version), so the key is now just based on that.

### What the new caching does

- **Mathlib oleans** (`~/.cache/mathlib`): Keyed only on `lake-manifest.json`. One cache entry per Mathlib version.
- **Project build** (`.lake/build`): Keyed on `lake-manifest.json` + `FormalConjectures/**/*.lean`. With `restore-keys` fallback, PR builds will restore the closest main branch cache and only rebuild changed files incrementally.
- **Save only on main**: Prevents PR branches from polluting the cache with partial builds. PRs still read from main's cache.

### Expected impact

On a typical PR that touches a few files, `lake build` will find most oleans already present in `.lake/build` from the cache and only recompile the changed files and their dependents — potentially cutting build time from ~45 minutes to a few minutes.

input.description: Create new branch for the CI caching fix

input.command:
git add .github/workflows/build-and-docs.yml && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(ci): cache project build artifacts to speed up CI builds

The CI workflow was taking ~45 minutes because it rebuilt all project
.lean files from scratch on every run. While Mathlib oleans were cached,
the project's own compiled artifacts in .lake/build were not.

Changes:

- Add a new cache for .lake/build (project build artifacts) keyed on
  lake-manifest.json + FormalConjectures/**/*.lean, with restore-keys
  fallback so PR builds can incrementally rebuild from the closest
  main branch cache.

- Fix Mathlib olean cache path mismatch: the old workflow restored
  ~/.cache/mathlib but saved ~/.cache (parent directory). Both are now
  consistently ~/.cache/mathlib.

- Simplify Mathlib olean cache key to only hash lake-manifest.json
  instead of lake-manifest.json + **/*.lean. Mathlib oleans only change
  when the Mathlib version is bumped, so including source file hashes
  caused unnecessary cache misses and duplicated entries.

- Add `|| true` to `lake exe cache unpack` to avoid failing when there
  is no prior cache to unpack.

- Gate cache saves with `if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'` to
  prevent PR branches from writing partial build caches that could
  pollute future restores. PRs still read from main's cache.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
input.description: Stage and commit the workflow changes
